allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\) — Length: $\($resp.Content.Length\) chars" } catch { "Error: $_" })
Bash(GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 GIT_SSH_COMMAND="ssh -o BatchMode=yes" timeout 20 git push -u origin main)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Test User","email":"test@example.com","message":"Hello there this is a test message"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/contact -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Bot","email":"bot@example.com","message":"spammy message here 123456","company":"filled"}')
